notes: Multiple critical bugs: level() is called as a function but also used as a variable causing errors, nextPiece is assigned but never used properly (next preview reads from bag incorrectly), DAS (delayed auto-shift) is missing causing uncontrollable rapid movement every frame when holding keys, and the title screen logic is broken with pieces not properly initialized before game start.

Fatal SyntaxError on load due to redeclaration of 'level' (as both a variable and a function) results in a blank screen; additionally, horizontal movement lacks DAS/ARR, making it unplayable even if fixed.
Core gameplay is undermined by a broken next-piece system and overly aggressive per-frame horizontal repeat, so it resembles Tetris visually but is not reliably playable.
